title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Archon is an open-source AI coding harness for building agent workflows that orchestrate autonomous code generation and deployment. Cole Medin demonstrated using it to combine Claude Opus and Kimi K2.6 models in a self-building codebase system called the AI Dark Factory.
